## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. PR titles/commits should follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (see CONTRIBUTING.md). -->

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (patch release)
- [ ] `feat` — new feature (minor release)
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` — code change without behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, CI, or dependencies
- [ ] Breaking change (`BREAKING CHANGE:` in commit body or `feat!:` / `fix!:` subject)

## Testing

<!-- Confirm what you verified. Dynamic icons require configured alternate icons — see README. -->

- [ ] `bun run build` (and `bun run codegen` if Nitro interfaces changed)
- [ ] Tested in the [example app](./example)
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Android
- [ ] Not applicable (docs-only / CI-only)
